intro: Bassovia novofriburgensis, commonly known as the 'Ecuadorian Angel's Trumpet', is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Ecuador. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in wound healing and the management of infections.
